reason: Place API glue in main.py, shared infra in common/, and concrete RAG integrations in tools/.
Keep delete/reindex/dedupe failures boundary-safe with HTTPException/ValueError/RuntimeError separation.
Behavior and persistence changes require focused regression tests and stable API boundaries.
This task changes API, service, registry, vector/object storage interactions, and frontend UI together.
Use stable subsystem-prefixed logs for knowledge operations without leaking secrets.
Knowledge file ingestion/retrieval contracts already live here and must stay compatible across API and Deep Research.
